_meta.description: Global agent cache for deploy-baba. Claude reads this on startup to avoid re-exploring unchanged code.
_meta.usage: Check git.sha against `git rev-parse HEAD`. If match: use cached data. If mismatch: re-scan changed components only, then update this file.

adrs.ADR-001: justfile-only interface — xtask is internal, never invoke directly
adrs.ADR-002: SQLite on EFS + S3 backup — no PostgreSQL, no RDS
adrs.ADR-003: Lambda Function URL — no API Gateway (exception: ADR-009 for POST /api/contact)
adrs.ADR-004: Dual-mode entry point — runtime env var detection (local vs Lambda)
adrs.ADR-007: OpenTofu over Terraform — MPL-2.0; `tofu` CLI; drop-in HCL compatible (Accepted)
adrs.ADR-008: Cognito Authentication — implicit grant, JWKS from env var, HttpOnly cookie, dev-mode bypass
adrs.ADR-009: API Gateway HTTP API for POST /api/contact — OAC body hash workaround (DRL-FUA-3)
adrs.ADR-010: SQLite Upsert as the Canonical Re-Seed Convention — INSERT … ON CONFLICT(natural_key) DO UPDATE SET …; bans INSERT OR IGNORE, INSERT OR REPLACE, split UPDATE+INSERT
adrs.ADR-011: Synchronous Email Lambda Invocation with Typed Response Propagation
adrs.ADR-014: Resume Professional Summary Sourced from DB (about_sections.me-bio)
adrs.ADR-016: RAG Architecture — FTS5 BM25, 6 corpora, grounded generation
adrs.ADR-019: React/Vite SPA Replaces Server-Side Askama Templates (Accepted 2026-04-30)

api-core.description: Universal zero-cost trait abstractions for API specification generation
api-core.role: Core trait definitions — implement these traits to generate API specs

api-graphql.description: GraphQL schema generator implementing api-core traits

api-grpc.description: gRPC/Protocol Buffer schema generator implementing api-core traits

api-merger.description: Multi-format API specification merging with conflict resolution
api-merger.role: Aggregates OpenAPI + GraphQL + gRPC specs, resolves conflicts

api-openapi.description: OpenAPI 3.0 specification generator implementing api-core traits

config-core.description: Universal zero-cost trait abstractions for configuration parsing
config-core.role: Core config trait — implement to support a new config format

config-json.description: JSON implementation of config-core universal traits

config-toml.description: TOML implementation of config-core universal traits

config-yaml.description: YAML implementation of config-core universal traits

infra-types.description: Cloud-agnostic infrastructure type definitions with SQLite + S3 backup support
infra-types.role: Shared infrastructure type definitions across cloud providers

latest_migrations: 012_update_about_sections (W-ABT — superseded split convention; ADR-010 upsert applies to new migrations)
013_align_linkedin_profile (W-LINK — ADR-010 upsert to update LinkedIn URL)
014_add_sync_unique_indexes (W-SYNC — composite UNIQUE indexes for job_details and competency_evidence; enables ADR-010 upserts on those tables)
database.upsert_convention: ADR-010 — INSERT … ON CONFLICT(natural_key) DO UPDATE SET …; banned: INSERT OR IGNORE, INSERT OR REPLACE, split UPDATE+INSERT

git.last_commit: revized ask with job description support

key_resources: Lambda Function URL (ADR-003, no API Gateway)
infra.status: WIP — tofu binary install + smoke test pending

known_patterns.api_generation: Implement api-core traits, use api-merger to combine formats
known_patterns.config_loading: stack.toml via config-toml crate (local only, not committed)
known_patterns.error_handling: thiserror in library crates, anyhow allowed in binaries/xtask
known_patterns.infra_codegen: Rust types in infra-types drive OpenTofu resource definitions
known_patterns.web_framework: axum 0.7 (JSON API) + React/Vite SPA in web/ (ADR-019)

P1: W-SYNC.4.2, .4.3, .4.5 — Audit UNIQUE constraints; implement live-DB pull path (Option B); backfill first sync migration
W-XT.4.2 — Remove or wire up EnvironmentInterpolator

project.description: Zero-cost Rust portfolio and deployment automation platform hosted on AWS Lambda
project.name: deploy-baba

ui.auth: AWS Cognito (W-AUTH) — implicit grant flow, JWKS from env var
ui.description: Pure JSON API server + SPA static asset host — the Lambda binary (ADR-019)
ui.routes_added: GET /api/admin/db-dump (W-SYNC.4.3) — VACUUM INTO snapshot, Cognito-gated, returns application/octet-stream
ui.runtime: aws-lambda (lambda_http) + local axum server (dual-mode via ADR-004)

web.tech: Vite 6 + React 18 + TypeScript strict + Tailwind CSS 3

xtask.description: Internal CLI plumbing — NEVER invoke directly, use `just` (ADR-001)
open_issues: W-XT.4.2: Remove or wire up EnvironmentInterpolator (dead code)
W-XT.4.3: Implement just infra-bootstrap (creates S3 + DynamoDB + SSM)
